data.name: TemplateTechnicalDetailsTooltip
data.value: Edit profile ID, template group & folder

data.name: GamepadMonitorToolbarTooltip
data.value: Show or hide the live monitor window. Resize the window to change width; it is saved in app settings.

data.name: WorkspaceHeaderCollapseTooltip
data.value: Hide the profile and template toolbar to give more room for mappings and editors. Your choice is saved in app settings.

data.name: WorkspaceHeaderExpandTooltip
data.value: Show the profile and template toolbar again.

data.name: ShowHud
data.value: Enable HUD for combo key tips

data.name: ComboHudPanelOpacityHint
data.value: Lower values make the panel more transparent; stored in local settings.

data.name: ProcessRestrictionHint
data.value: Type the game's executable name (same as in Task Manager, usually without .exe). It is stored in the profile JSON—there is no list of running processes. Output is sent only when that process has the foreground window.

data.name: TargetProcessNameToolTip
data.value: Example: notepad or MyGame — must match Process Name in Task Manager. Save profile to persist.

data.name: HoldBindHelp
data.value: Hold bind (optional): Short press trigger type must be set to Tap. Hold the button past the threshold to send the hold key once; releasing quickly sends the tap key. Only button combos without LT/RT are supported.

data.name: AppSettingsTooltip
data.value: Language, updates, input/output, gamepad, mapping, and radial/HUD options. Values are saved to your local config file (not in the profile JSON).

data.name: ExitOnCloseLabel
data.value: Exit app when closing (instead of hiding to tray)

data.name: InputApiWin32Hint
data.value: Uses Windows SendInput for simulated keys and mouse. More backends can be added later.

data.name: HumanNoiseEnableTooltip
data.value: Varies delays, mouse movement, and keyboard tap duration (±10 ms around the "Keyboard tap duration" setting).

data.name: GamepadSourceXInputHint
data.value: Standard Windows API for Xbox and compatible controllers.

data.name: GamepadSourceDualSenseHint
data.value: Native support for DualSense features (adaptive triggers, etc). Not yet implemented.

data.name: MouseLookStickLayoutHint
data.value: Camera rotation and movement on the same stick share that stick. When possible, map look to one stick and movement to the other for clearer control.

data.name: CatalogRadialSlotsHint
data.value: Each slot references a keyboard action id. Save profile to persist.

data.name: ProfileEditorPlaceholder
data.value: Select a row in the list or add one to edit details here.

data.name: VisualEditorNoMappingHint
data.value: This control is not mapped yet. Add a mapping to use it in your profile.

data.name: VisualEditorLogicalControlMappingsSelectHint
data.value: Click a control on the diagram to list every mapping that uses it (including chords).

data.name: VisualEditorAddMappingForControl
data.value: Add another mapping for this control

data.name: ControllerOverlayPrimaryLineLabel
data.value: Primary line on each mapped control

data.name: ControllerOverlayLabelModeActionAndPhysical
data.value: Mapping summary and gamepad button name

data.name: ControllerOverlayShowSecondaryLabel
data.value: Show “+N” when a control has multiple mappings

data.name: ProfileEditorKeyboardActionHint
data.value: Ids are referenced by mappings and radial slots. Save profile to persist.

data.name: ProfileEditorRadialMenuHint
data.value: Configure the stick and slots below. Title and HUD label are the default strings (typically English); optional zh-CN fields map to displayNames / labels in JSON. Save profile to persist.

data.name: ItemCycleDefaultBehavior
data.value: Keeps one active slot from 1 to n (wrapping). By default each press sends that slot’s number key, with optional modifiers above. Leave the two optional outputs in the next section empty to keep this behavior.

data.name: ItemCycleLoopKeysHint
data.value: Only when the game does not use 1–9 for slots—for example it scrolls with other keys or mouse buttons. Use the same token format as Tap. You must set both fields, or leave both empty.

data.name: ItemCycleWithKeys
data.value: Optional chord modifiers (e.g. LeftAlt or LeftCtrl+LeftShift), applied with the digit or with custom outputs below.

data.name: TemplateToggleHint
data.value: Add the same button on each profile and point each at the other template’s ID so one press swaps modes (e.g. General ↔ Vehicle). Uses Pressed or Tap; no keyboard output.

data.name: SourceCombinationHint
data.value: Pick two inputs (buttons or LeftTrigger / RightTrigger) for a chord. For three or more segments, use the single-field box (editable).

data.name: SourceKindSwitchHint
data.value: Source kind changed — the previous value was replaced with a default compatible with the new kind. Use Update to save.

data.name: MappingDetailsAnalogThresholdStickHint
data.value: Optional for thumbstick mappings. Empty uses the built-in default (typically 0.35). Otherwise use a value between 0 and 1.

data.name: TriggerChordMatchThresholdHint
data.value: Required when LT or RT is part of the source. Use a value between 0 and 1 (not 0). Example: 0.35

data.name: TriggerChordThresholdRequiredMessage
data.value: Enter a trigger match threshold between 0 and 1 (exclusive of 0) when the source includes LeftTrigger or RightTrigger.

data.name: MappingEditorInvalidSource
data.value: Fix the gamepad source (e.g. valid button or chord).

data.name: MappingEditorInvalidAction
data.value: Configure a valid action for this mapping.

data.name: MappingEditorSaveFailedGeneric
data.value: Check the source, trigger threshold (for LT/RT chords), and action.

data.name: ComboHudGateHint
data.value: Combo HUD preview is off: keyboard/mouse output is blocked (check target process, foreground window, or elevation).

data.name: UpdateInstallPromptNow
data.value:
Download completed: {0}
Install now? The app will close automatically.

data.name: UpdateInstallPackageNotFound
data.value: Package file not found. Please download again.

data.name: UpdateInstallReadyPrompt
data.value:
Ready to install: {0}
The app will close and apply update. Continue?

data.name: UpdateOverwriteExistingFilePrompt
UpdateNoPackageForInstallMode
data.value: No downloadable package is available for the current install mode.

data.name: UpdateChecksumSignatureValidationFailed
data.value: Release package checksum signature validation failed. Download is blocked.

data.name: UpdateSecureChecksumMissing
data.value: Secure checksum is missing for this package. Re-download from a signed release.

data.name: UpdateQuotaCooldownBlocked
data.value: Too many requests. Please retry in {0} seconds.

data.name: UpdateQuotaDailyLimitBlocked
data.value: Daily limit reached for {0} ({1} per day). Please try again tomorrow.

data.name: WelcomeToastMessage
data.value: Thanks for trying the app. Pick a template, map your buttons, and you are ready to play. You can change language, updates, and more in Settings whenever you like.

data.name: ProfileMappingUnusedCatalogActionIdsHint
data.value: Notice: {0} catalog action ID(s) are not used in any mapping or radial menu.

data.name: CommunityUpload_ChecksIntro
data.value: These checks mirror the community repository validator. Each step explains what we verify before your pull request is opened.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Step_Submission_Prompt
data.value: We confirm the game folder, author folder, and listing description are filled in and combine into a valid catalog path for the JSON we will commit.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Step_Selection_Prompt
data.value: We verify at least one template is selected and that no two selected files share the same profileId (the repository requires unique ids per file).

data.name: CommunityUpload_Step_Content_Prompt
data.value: We run the same profile and keyboard-action catalog checks as the app and the community CI script: mappings, radial menus, action references, and resolver rules for actionId / holdActionId.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_GameFolder
data.value: Enter a single folder name for the game (letters, digits, dot, underscore, hyphen). It becomes the first segment of the path on GitHub.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_AuthorFolder
data.value: Enter your author folder name (one segment, no slashes). It groups your templates under the game folder.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_ListingDescription
data.value: Add a short plain-text description for the community listing. It is stored in the template JSON.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_PathRules
data.value: Use only valid single-segment names: avoid / \\ : * ? " < > | and control characters.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_SelectTemplate
data.value: Check at least one template in the list above, or cancel if you meant to upload nothing.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_DuplicateProfileId
data.value: Rename one of the profiles so each selected file has a unique profileId, or exclude extras from this submission.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_ProfileId
data.value: Open the template in the profile panel and set a non-empty profile ID that matches the file name convention you use.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_MappingsRequired
data.value: Ensure the JSON includes a mappings array. Save the profile from the app if the file was hand-edited.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_MappingInput
data.value: Every mapping needs a gamepad input (the from.value field).

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_MappingOutput
data.value: Add a keyboard output, or point the mapping at a keyboardActions id that defines the output.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_KeyboardCatalog
data.value: Align keyboardActions ids with actionId / holdActionId on mappings, remove duplicates, and give each catalog entry a real output.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_CatalogFolderJson
data.value: Fix templateCatalogFolder in JSON to valid single-segment parts, or clear it and let the app manage paths.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_RadialMenu
data.value: Check radial menu ids and item actionId values reference existing keyboardActions entries.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_TemplateGroupId
data.value: Use only letters, digits, dot, underscore, and hyphen in the template group id.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_ActionIdExclusive
data.value: Remove inline itemCycle / templateToggle / radialMenu from this mapping, or stop using actionId on the same row.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_WarningReview
data.value: Optional: address warnings to match stricter repository settings (warnings-as-errors).

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_Generic
data.value: Compare your template with a working profile from Assets/Profiles/templates or fix the field mentioned in the message.

data.name: CommunityUpload_FixIssuesBeforeUpload
data.value: Fix the issues listed under Repository checks before uploading, or cancel.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Intro
data.value: Submit the current template and any profiles linked by template switches for review via a GitHub pull request. Uncheck templates you do not want in this submission.

data.name: CommunityUpload_TokenFootnote
data.value: Uploads use Cloudflare Worker + Turnstile handshake only. If the relevant configuration does not exist, you need to fill in the communityProfilesUploadWorkerUrl or Turnstile information in local_settings.json.

data.name: CommunityUpload_SelectionSummary
data.value: {0} of {1} template file(s) selected for upload.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Error_SelectAtLeastOne
data.value: Select at least one template to upload.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Error_PathAlreadyPublished
data.value:
These paths already exist in the community repository. Change the game folder, author folder, or profile id, then try again.
{0}

data.name: CommunityCatalog_OverwriteWarning
CommunityCatalog_OverwriteWarningExact
CommunityCatalog_DeleteConfirmMessage
CommunityUpload_Error_PipelineBusy
data.value: The community repository pipeline is currently busy processing another upload. Please try again in a moment.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_MaxFilesPerUpload
data.value: Select up to 8 templates for a single upload request.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_JsonOnlyUpload
data.value: Only .json template files can be uploaded.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_TemplateFileSizeLimit
data.value: Each template file must be 1 MB or smaller before upload.

data.name: CommunityCatalog_RefreshCooldownTooltip
data.value: Please wait about {0} s before refreshing again.

data.name: WebView2_RuntimeRequired_Message
data.value:
Template upload verification needs the Microsoft Edge WebView2 Runtime. It does not appear to be installed on this PC.
Open the Microsoft download page to install it (Evergreen Runtime), then try again?

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_TextPolicyViolation
data.value: Remove disallowed wording from submission or template text before uploading.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Step_TextPolicy_Prompt
data.value: Please use polite language and avoid offensive words. Otherwise, it will be rejected.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_LinkOrDomainNotAllowed
data.value: Remove website links, email addresses, and domain-like text from submission and template fields before uploading.

data.name: CommunityUpload_TextPolicy_FieldViolationDetail
data.value: {0} contains text that is not allowed for community uploads.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Metadata_AuthorNameTooLong
data.value: Author name must be {0} characters or fewer.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Metadata_AuthorNameInvalidChars
data.value: Author name can only include letters, numbers, spaces, hyphen (-), underscore (_), and apostrophe (').

data.name: CommunityUpload_Metadata_ListingDescriptionTooLong
data.value: Listing description must be {0} characters or fewer.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_AuthorNameRules
data.value: Use the counter under the field: stay within the limit and avoid symbols other than hyphen, underscore, and apostrophe.

data.name: CommunityUpload_Suggest_ListingDescriptionLength
data.value: Shorten the listing description to fit within the character limit shown under the field.

data.name: CommunityCatalog_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by name, author, description, folder, file name, tags…

data.name: CommunityUpload_Error_IndexRefreshFailed
data.value: Could not load the latest community catalog. Check your connection and try again.

data.name: CommunityCatalog_DownloadRateLimitedMinInterval
data.value: Please wait {0} seconds before downloading another community template.

data.name: CommunityCatalog_DownloadRateLimitedHourly
data.value: You reached the hourly download limit for community templates. Try again in about {0} minutes.

data.name: CommunityUpload_TextPolicy_FieldViolationWithFieldText
data.value: {0} contains text that is not allowed for community uploads. Field content: {1}

data.name: ProfileRuleClipboard_CopyTooltip
data.value: Copy the selected row(s) to the app rule clipboard (Ctrl+C). You can paste after switching templates.

data.name: ProfileRuleClipboard_PasteTooltip
data.value: Paste the copied rule(s) into this template (Ctrl+V). Duplicate catalog IDs are renamed automatically.

data.name: ProfileRuleClipboard_PayloadInvalid
data.value: The copied rule data could not be read.

data.name: ProfileRuleClipboard_UnsupportedPayload
data.value: That clipboard entry is not supported here.

data.name: ProfileRuleClipboard_UndoTooltip
data.value: Undo the last change to this template (Ctrl+Z).

data.name: ProfileRuleClipboard_RedoTooltip
data.value: Redo a change to this template (Ctrl+Shift+Z).

data.name: KeyboardCapture_Prompt_MappingOutput
data.value: Press a key for the mapping output (Esc to cancel).

data.name: KeyboardCapture_Prompt_MappingHoldOutput
data.value: Press the HOLD output key (Esc to cancel).

data.name: KeyboardCapture_Prompt_CatalogActionOutput
data.value: Press a key for the action output (Esc to cancel).

data.name: KeyboardCapture_Prompt_ItemCycleForward
data.value: Press the loop-forward output key (Esc to cancel).

data.name: KeyboardCapture_Prompt_ItemCycleBackward
data.value: Press the loop-back output key (Esc to cancel).

data.name: KeyboardCapture_Prompt_NewBindingOutput
data.value: Press a key for the new key binding (Esc to cancel).

data.name: KeyboardCapture_Prompt_NewBindingHoldOutput
data.value: Press the HOLD output key for the new binding (Esc to cancel).

data.name: CommunityCatalog_UploadSelectTemplateFirst
data.value: Select a template in the profile panel before uploading.

data.name: WorkspaceUnsavedIndicator
data.value: You have unsaved changes — click Save profile to keep them.

data.name: WorkspaceUnsavedSwitchPrompt
data.value:
The current template has unsaved changes. Save before switching to another template?
Yes — Save and continue No — Discard changes and continue Cancel — Stay on this template

data.name: WorkspaceUnsavedReloadPrompt
data.value:
Reload this template from disk and discard unsaved edits in the editor?
Yes — Save to disk first, then reload No — Discard unsaved edits and reload Cancel — Keep editing

data.name: WorkspaceUnsavedRefreshTemplatesListPrompt
data.value:
Refresh the template list from disk. Unsaved edits in the current template may be lost unless you save.
Yes — Save the current template first No — Discard unsaved edits, then refresh the list Cancel — Do not refresh

data.name: WorkspaceUnsavedExitPrompt
data.value:
Quit without saving changes to the current template?
Yes — Save and exit No — Exit and discard changes Cancel — Keep working

data.name: WorkspaceSave_BuildSnapshotFailed
data.value: Could not build a template snapshot.

data.name: StartupDiagnostics_FatalErrorBodyFormat
ElevationRelaunch_Message
data.value:
The currently focused target appears to be running as administrator.
To avoid Windows UIPI input blocking, relaunch this tool as administrator?

data.name: DebugCornerToast_Message
data.value: Launched with --debug-toast. Dismiss or wait for auto-hide; no update or welcome flow runs.

data.name: ProfileMappingDuplicateCatalogActionIdsHint
data.value: {0} keyboard action IDs have duplicate controller bindings.

data.name: ProfileMappingDuplicateCatalogActionIdsTooltipTitle
data.value: Currently duplicated keyboard action bindings are:

data.name: KeyboardActionPicker_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by action id, description, or key...

data.name: ElevationRelaunch_TargetMessageFormat
data.value:
The selected target '{0}' is running as administrator.
This mapper is not elevated, so Windows UIPI can block injected input.
Relaunch this tool as administrator now?

data.name: KeyboardActionPicker_HoldSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search long press action by id, description, or key...

data.name: WorkspaceSave_AttentionTooltip
data.value: Save this template to keep your unsaved changes.

data.name: TargetProcessRefreshTooltip
data.value: Re-scan for a running process matching the name above (useful if you opened this tool before starting the game).

data.name: TargetProcessRefresh_AttentionTooltip
data.value: No matching process found yet — click to re-detect.

data.name: TrayIcon_Tooltip
data.value: Gamepad Mapping — running in the background

data.name: AutomationWorkspace_ComingSoon
data.value: Recently used & favorites will appear here in a future release. Double‑click or drag nodes onto the canvas.

data.name: AutomationWorkspace_NodeLibraryHint
data.value: Double-click to spawn in viewport center, drag to place manually, and star nodes to pin favorites.

data.name: AutomationTopology_CycleDetected
data.value: Execution graph contains a cycle — remove or rewiring execution edges so the automation can halt.

data.name: AutomationTopology_DataCycleDetected
data.value: Data graph contains a cycle — remove circular data dependencies before running automation.

data.name: AutomationConnection_SourcePortNotFound
data.value: The selected source port does not exist on this node.

data.name: AutomationConnection_TargetPortNotFound
data.value: The selected input port does not exist on this node.

data.name: AutomationConnection_TypeMismatch
data.value: Incompatible connection — port types must match.

data.name: AutomationConnection_InvalidDirection
data.value: Incompatible connection — links must flow from output to input.

data.name: AutomationConnection_NodeMissing
data.value: Cannot connect — one or both nodes are missing from the graph.

data.name: AutomationConnection_ExecutionOutAlreadyConnected
data.value: This execution output is already connected. Remove the existing link first.

data.name: AutomationConnection_TargetInputAlreadyConnected
data.value: This input already has a source link.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_CaptureScreen
data.value: Grabs pixels for downstream vision checks.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_Delay
data.value: Pauses execution for a fixed duration.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_BranchImage
data.value: Routes execution depending on visual match logic.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_KeyboardKey
data.value: Sends a keystroke via the emulation stack.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_FindImage
data.value: Looks for a template inside the haystack bitmap.

data.name: AutomationWorkspace_RoiSavedOk
data.value: Region saved on the selected node.

data.name: AutomationInlineEditor_FindImageNeedlePathPlaceholder
data.value: Browse or screenshot a PNG/JPEG (required for template match; optional for YOLO)

data.name: AutomationSmoke_Cycle
data.value: Cannot run while the execution graph has a cycle.

data.name: AutomationSmoke_NoRoot
data.value: No execution entry node — every node has an incoming execution link.

data.name: AutomationSmoke_EmptyRoi
data.value: A capture screen node is set to ROI mode but has no rectangle.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_MathBinary
data.value: Calculates a value from two numeric inputs.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_Comparison
data.value: Compares two numeric values and outputs a boolean.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_BooleanBinary
data.value: Combines two booleans with a logical operation.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_Random
data.value: Outputs a random integer in configured range.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_GetVariable
data.value: Reads a value from the automation blackboard.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_SetVariable
data.value: Writes a value to the automation blackboard.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_Switch
data.value: Routes execution by matching an input value.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_LoopControl
data.value: Requests break or continue for active loop.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_Log
data.value: Writes a message to run log.

data.name: AutomationInlineEditor_VariableValuePlaceholder
data.value: Used when no input port is linked

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_KeyState
data.value: Holds, releases, or inspects keyboard key state.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_PidController
data.value: Computes a continuous control signal from current and target values.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_MouseJitter
data.value: Applies human-like noise to a configured mouse delta and emits movement.

data.name: AutomationInlineEditor_InputModePlaceholder
data.value: Leave empty for global setting, or use Win32/InputInjection

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_Macro
data.value: Executes a referenced sub-graph and then resumes outer flow.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_EventListener
data.value: Starts execution when a matching event signal is published.

data.name: AutomationNode_Summary_EventEmit
data.value: Publishes a named signal to the automation event bus.

data.name: AutomationWorkspace_MiniMapHint
data.value: Drag or click to jump viewport

data.name: AutomationWorkspace_EmergencyStopTooltip
data.value: Immediately stop the currently running automation script.

data.name: AutomationWorkspace_RunAlreadyInProgressLog
data.value: [Run] Another automation run is already in progress.

data.name: AutomationWorkspace_NeedleScreenshotSavedOk
data.value: Saved the selected region as the find-image template.

data.name: AutomationRegionPicker_Instructions
data.value: Drag to select. Corners resize. Arrows nudge (Shift=10px). Enter confirm, Esc cancel.

data.name: AutomationInlineEditor_NodeDescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Add a short description for this node

data.name: AutomationInlineEditor_FindImageYoloOnnxPathPlaceholder
data.value: Path to a YOLO .onnx (Ultralytics export, 640), or leave empty to use the bundled yolo.onnx (YOLO11n COCO) or yolo.onnx / model.onnx / default.onnx in %LocalAppData%\GamepadMapping\Automation\YoloOnnx or Assets\Automation\Models

data.name: AutomationVisionAlgorithmPicker_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search algorithms by name or storage id

data.name: AutomationInlineEditor_CaptureProcessNamePlaceholder
data.value: Optional, e.g. obs64 (empty = current foreground target window)

data.name: AutomationInlineEditor_CaptureCacheRefNodeIdPlaceholder
data.value: Optional GUID of another capture node to reuse

data.name: AutomationNodeContextMenu_UseAsCaptureCacheSource
data.value: Use as Cache Source for Selected Capture Node

data.name: AutomationNodeContextMenu_CaptureCacheApply_InvalidSelection
data.value: Select a capture node first, then right-click another capture node.

data.name: AutomationInlineEditor_VariableDefaultValuePlaceholder
data.value: Optional JSON literal if the variable is missing (e.g. 0, true, "text")

data.name: AutomationRoiPreview_NoRoi
data.value: Select a Screen Capture node with a saved ROI to preview.

data.name: AutomationRoiPreview_NoCapture
data.value: Select a Screen Capture node (ROI, full screen, or process window).

data.name: AutomationRoiPreview_NoPreviewCacheRef
data.value: This node reuses another capture. Preview the source capture node, or remove the cache reference to preview here.

data.name: AutomationRoiPreview_StoredFullModeHint
data.value: Snapshot on open/refresh. Enable Live screen to stream updates.

data.name: AutomationRoiPreview_FullModeSnapshotFailed
data.value: Could not capture preview (window not found, minimized, or protected). Focus the target window and try Refresh.

data.name: AutomationInlineEditor_LoopInteriorSkipDocumentStepInterval
data.value: Skip graph step interval inside loop body

data.name: AutomationInlineEditor_FindImageOcrPhrasesPlaceholder
data.value: Substring match against recognized screen text (language packs required).

data.name: AutomationInlineEditor_FindImageOcrMaxLongEdgePx
data.value: OCR max image long edge (px, 0 = default)

data.name: AutomationWorkspace_RoiInspectorLivePreviewHint
data.value: Stream the capture region in real time (same timing as the ROI preview window). Turn off to show only the saved snapshot and reduce CPU use; full-screen live preview is more expensive than a small region.

data.name: AutomationInlineEditor_CaptureProcessIdPlaceholder
data.value: Optional PID; use 0 to resolve by process name
